title: Rulemaking
doc_html:
§288.10. Rulemaking

            The department shall promulgate and enforce any rules and regulations as are necessary to implement the provisions of this Subpart in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

            Acts 2019, No. 400, §2, eff. June 19, 2019.
doc_text:
§288.10.  Rulemaking
The department shall promulgate and enforce any rules and regulations as are
necessary to implement the provisions of this Subpart in accordance with the Administrative
Procedure Act.
Acts 2019, No. 400, §2, eff. June 19, 2019.
